svg.title: Autonomous Multimodal Clinical AI Assistant – System Architecture
svg.desc: A layered architecture diagram showing data flow from ingestion through preprocessing, fusion, reasoning, safety, output, monitoring and self-learning.

g.text: EHR · Medical images · Clinical notes · Wearables · Omics
Human-in-the-loop · Uncertainty (MC Dropout, Conformal) · Bias auditing · Audit logs
Clinical reports · Risk scores · SHAP/LIME explanations · AI nurse chatbot · Alerts
